faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: What is a dynamic QR code?
faq.a1: A dynamic QR code points to a short URL that you control. You can change where it redirects at any time — without reprinting the QR code. Static QR codes, by contrast, encode the destination directly and can never be changed.
faq.q2: Can I change the link after printing?
faq.a2: Yes! That's the whole point. Change the destination URL anytime from your dashboard. The printed QR code stays the same.
faq.a3: You can see total scans, scans per day, country breakdown, and device information. Pro and Business plans include full analytics dashboards.
faq.a4: Yes. The free plan includes 3 dynamic QR codes with up to 1,000 scans per month. No credit card required.
faq.q5: What happens if my destination URL goes down?
faq.a5: We monitor your destinations and send you an email alert if we detect a broken link. You'll never have a QR code pointing to a 404 page without knowing about it.
faq.q6: Can I use my own logo?
faq.a6: Yes! Upload your logo and it will be embedded in the center of your QR code. We automatically adjust error correction to ensure the code still scans perfectly.
